## Scope check

Phantom is opinionated (see CONTRIBUTING.md). Confirm your proposal does NOT:

- [ ] Add account systems, email collection, or identity records
- [ ] Add third-party JS, fonts, analytics, or CDN deps to the frontend
- [ ] Log IPs, prompt content, completion content, or request bodies
- [ ] Persist secrets to disk (passphrases, API keys, wallet passwords)
- [ ] Introduce Postgres / Redis / Docker as the deployment story
